flows.label: Model Hub
flows.purpose: Show authenticated Hub and physical-storage promotion evidence beside model discovery, hardware fit, runtime operations, and Developer API controls.

flows.purpose: Show the RAG-first knowledge, ACL, citation, replay, and evaluation workflow.

flows.purpose: Show runtime governance, Provider Ops, compatibility sunset rehearsal, and observability read-models.
